insights.message: Moderate capital efficiency — ROE 14.1% in FY2025
Negative Free Cash Flow margin -25.2% in FY2025 — heavy capex phase

anomalies.message: Total debt surged +52.1% YoY in FY2025 — significant leverage increase
Free cash flow has been negative for 2+ consecutive years ending FY2024 — sustained cash burn
